findings.title: ggml-org/llama.cpp
findings.description: LLM inference in C/C++

findings.title: h2oai/h2ogpt
findings.description: Private chat with local GPT with document, images, video, etc. 100% private, Apache 2.0. Supports oLLaMa, Mixtral, llama.cpp, and more. Demo: https://gpt.h2o.ai/ https://gpt-docs.h2o.ai/

findings.title: abetlen/llama-cpp-python
findings.description: Python bindings for llama.cpp

findings.title: intel/ipex-llm
findings.description: Accelerate local LLM inference and finetuning (LLaMA, Mistral, ChatGLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Mixtral, Gemma, Phi, MiniCPM, Qwen-VL, MiniCPM-V, etc.) on Intel XPU (e.g., local PC with iGPU and NPU, discrete GPU such as Arc, Flex and Max); seamlessly integrate with llama.cpp, Ollama, HuggingFace, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vLLM, DeepSpeed, Axolotl, etc.

findings.title: serge-chat/serge
findings.description: A web interface for chatting with Alpaca through llama.cpp. Fully dockerized, with an easy to use API.

findings.title: ngxson/smolvlm-realtime-webcam
findings.description: Real-time webcam demo with SmolVLM and llama.cpp server

findings.title: johnbean393/Sidekick
findings.description: A native macOS app that allows users to chat with a local LLM that can respond with information from files, folders and websites on your Mac without installing any other software. Powered by llama.cpp.

findings.title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
findings.description: Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

findings.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
findings.description: Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.

findings.title: withcatai/node-llama-cpp
findings.description: Run AI models locally on your machine with node.js bindings for llama.cpp. Enforce a JSON schema on the model output on the generation level

findings.title: ikawrakow/ik_llama.cpp
findings.description: llama.cpp fork with additional SOTA quants and improved performance

findings.title: gotzmann/llama.go
findings.description: llama.go is like llama.cpp in pure Golang!

findings.title: RahulSChand/gpu_poor
findings.description: Calculate token/s & GPU memory requirement for any LLM.  Supports llama.cpp/ggml/bnb/QLoRA quantization

findings.title: milanglacier/minuet-ai.nvim
findings.description: 💃 Dance with Intelligence in Your Code. Minuet offers code completion as-you-type from popular LLMs including OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, Ollama, Llama.cpp, Codestral, and more.

findings.title: ngxson/wllama
findings.description: WebAssembly binding for llama.cpp - Enabling on-browser LLM inference

findings.title: nomic-ai/pygpt4all
findings.description: Official supported Python bindings for llama.cpp + gpt4all

findings.title: mybigday/llama.rn
findings.description: React Native binding of llama.cpp

findings.title: go-skynet/go-llama.cpp
findings.description: LLama.cpp golang bindings

findings.title: Atome-FE/llama-node
findings.description: Believe in AI democratization. llama for nodejs backed by llama-rs, llama.cpp and rwkv.cpp, work locally on your laptop CPU. support llama/alpaca/gpt4all/vicuna/rwkv model.

findings.title: devoxx/DevoxxGenieIDEAPlugin
findings.description: DevoxxGenie is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that uses local LLM's (Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Jan and Llama.cpp) and Cloud based LLMs to help review, test, explain your project code. Latest version now also supports Spec Driven Development with CLI Runners.
